# architmittal.com — AI-Readable Site Summary

## About
Archit Mittal is an AI automation expert based in India who helps businesses save lakhs through intelligent automation using Claude Code, n8n, MCP Protocol, and multi-agent AI systems.

## Tagline
I Automate Chaos

## Key Facts
- Saved a client ₹85,000/month on AI API costs (97.5% reduction)
- Built 40+ automation workflows for businesses
- 9,500+ LinkedIn followers
- Expert in Claude Code, n8n, MCP Protocol, multi-agent systems

## Services
- AI Workflow Automation
- AI API Cost Optimization
- No-Code/Low-Code Solutions
- Multi-Agent AI Systems
